# Mata Langit

> Mata Langit — Rails 8 + Inertia.js + React app.

This file follows the llms.txt convention (https://llmstxt.org). It gives
LLM crawlers a curated, plain-text map of the public site so they can
ingest the most important pages without having to render JavaScript.

Keep this list scoped to **publicly viewable** pages — anything behind
authentication should not appear here.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://example.com/): Landing page and entry point.

## About

- (Add about / company / team pages here as they are created.)

## Product

- (Add feature, pricing, and product pages here as they are created.)

## Resources

- (Add docs, blog posts, changelog, and help pages here as they are
  created. Prefer linking to the canonical URL of each page.)

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://example.com/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of
  every public URL, regenerated by `bin/rails sitemap:refresh`.
